description: The 41 canonical roles (WHY dimension) - SWEBOK-enhanced from original 33

Query.purpose: Data retrieval request - represents intent to read without modification

Finder.purpose: Search for data based on criteria - the execution logic for queries

Loader.purpose: Load data from storage or external source - bulk or batch retrieval

Getter.purpose: Access a single property or attribute - simple value retrieval

Command.purpose: Intent to modify state - represents a request for change

Creator.purpose: Create new entities or records - instantiation with business logic

Mutator.purpose: Modify existing entity or state - in-place updates

Destroyer.purpose: Delete or remove entities - cleanup and removal logic

Factory.purpose: Create and configure new instances - encapsulated instantiation

Builder.purpose: Construct complex objects step by step - fluent API pattern

Repository.purpose: Abstract data persistence operations - collection-like interface for aggregates

Store.purpose: Manage application state - centralized state container

Cache.purpose: Temporarily store data for performance - avoid repeated computation or I/O

Service.purpose: Coordinate business operations - stateless business logic

Controller.purpose: Handle external requests - entry point for outside world

Manager.purpose: Manage resources or components - lifecycle and pooling

Orchestrator.purpose: Coordinate complex workflows - multi-step process coordination

Validator.purpose: Verify data meets constraints - input validation

Verifier.purpose: Confirm build correctness - 'are we building it right?' (SWEBOK)

Guard.purpose: Protect access or enforce conditions - authorization checks

Asserter.purpose: Assert truth of conditions - invariant enforcement

Serializer.purpose: Convert objects to output format - object to bytes/string

Parser.purpose: Convert input format to structured data - bytes/string to object

Handler.purpose: Process events or requests - active event processing

Listener.purpose: Passive event observation - subscribe and delegate

Subscriber.purpose: Subscribe to event streams - async message consumption

Utility.purpose: General stateless helper - pure utility functions

Formatter.purpose: Format output for display - human-readable presentation

StatisticalAnalyzer.purpose: Data analysis - metrics and statistical computation (SWEBOK KA-QUA)

Lifecycle.purpose: Manage object/process lifecycle - init, cleanup, hooks

ProjectManager.purpose: Resource and schedule coordination - project governance (SWEBOK KA-MGT)

RiskManager.purpose: Risk identification and mitigation - failure prevention (SWEBOK KA-MGT)
